# Amarbir Singh — Personal Website

Personal website and portfolio of Amarbir Singh, a Software Engineer and AI enthusiast.

## About

Amarbir Singh is a Software Engineer based in Canada, passionate about building tools, AI systems, and open-source projects.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://singhamarbir.com/) — Main landing page with skills and introduction
- [Resume](https://cv.singhamarbir.com/) — Resume and professional experience
- [GitHub](https://github.com/a-5ingh) — Open-source projects and contributions
- [Email](mailto:amarbir1800@gmail.com) — Contact Amarbir
